text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Footage shows tankers breaching the U.S. maritime blockade. TankerTrackers confirms via 3-day AIS data that multiple U.S.-sanctioned tankers are moving freely across the blockade line between eastern Oman and the Iran–Pakistan border, despite U.S. military presence. Only vessels with AIS on are counted—others may have passed undetected. This contradicts CENTCOM’s claim that no ships crossed in the first 48 hours.
🇱🇧 Removal of an Israeli flag previously raised by Israeli Occupation Forces at Beaufort Castle (Qalaat al-Shqif) in southern Lebanon. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
🇮🇷 Pink Jeep

🇷🇺 Overnight, a Soyuz-2.1B launch from Plesetsk Cosmodrome successfully placed military payloads into low Earth orbit. The launch may also have deployed additional satellites for Russia’s “Rassvet” low-orbit communications constellation. ℹ️ “Rassvet” is a Russian low-Earth-orbit satellite internet constellation developed by Bureau 1440. It aims to deliver high-speed, low-latency broadband connectivity from space using a network of small satellites, similar in concept to Starlink. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇮🇷 🇺🇸 TankerTrackers data based on a 3 day AIS (Automatic Identification System) playback since a reported maritime blockade line was set between Oman’s eastern coast and the Iran Pakistan border shows multiple tankers under US sanctions continuing to enter and leave the area. These are only vessels broadcasting AIS signals, so ships operating without AIS are not included. TankerTrackers also says several of the same vessels have been confirmed in recent satellite imagery, suggesting limited AIS spoofing in this dataset. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Jeff21461 : 🇩🇪 Germany is considering equipping corps-level artillery units with loitering munitions capable of reaching targets at a 200 to 300km range (similar to the FP-2 in Ukrainian service). Additionally, the Bundeswehr will be setting up a loitering munitions battery under each of the brigade and division-level artillery battalions. The first of which will be under the 45th Brigade in Lithuania, with the 21st Brigade to follow shortly after. https://www.hartpunkt.de/indirekte-wirkung-durch-artillerie-und-loitering-munition-deutsches-heer-erwartet-zeitnah-mehr-masse-und-neue-faehigkeiten/ tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @Jeff21461：🇩🇪 德国正在考虑为军级炮兵部队配备射程可达200至300公里的巡飞弹（类似于乌克兰服役的FP-2）。此外，德国联邦国防军将在每个旅级和师级炮兵营下设立一个巡飞弹连。第一个连将隶属于立陶宛的第45旅，第21旅紧随其后。https://www.hartpunkt.de/indirekte-wirkung-durch-artillerie-und-loitering-munition-deutsches-heer-erwartet-zeitnah-mehr-masse-und-neue-faehigkeiten/ 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ‼️ 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 BREAKING | China’s Ministry of Defense has openly warned Japan and called on it to immediately halt its steps toward militarization, stating that otherwise tensions in the region will escalate. “We urge the Japanese side to stop its retrogressive moves and make a clean break with militarism. Otherwise, it will lose the trust of its Asian neighbors and the international community. Japanese militarism once inflicted untold suffering on the region and beyond, yet a full reckoning has never taken place after World War II. Now, the Japanese side has completely stripped away its pretense and accelerated its pace of re-militarization, sparking deep concern and condemnation around the world,” a Chinese defense spokesperson said, in response to Japan’s increased defense budget and plans to allow the export of weapons. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：‼️ 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 突发 | 中国国防部公开警告日本，呼吁其立即停止军事化步伐，并表示否则地区紧张局势将会升级。“我们敦促日方停止倒行逆施，彻底与军国主义切割。否则，它将失去亚洲邻国和国际社会的信任。日本军国主义曾给该地区及其他地区带来深重灾难，但二战后从未进行过彻底清算。现在，日方已完全撕下伪装，加快了再军事化的步伐，引发了全世界的深切关注和谴责，”中国国防部发言人在回应日本增加国防预算及允许武器出口的计划时表示。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The Syrian Social Nationalist Party praised Hezbollah’s resistance for imposing deterrence and thanked Iran for including Lebanon in tough negotiations with the U.S. Lebanese President Joseph Aoun described direct negotiations as critical and said the ceasefire is the entry point for talks. He demanded Israeli withdrawal from southern territory, the return of prisoners, and resolution of border disputes. The Lebanese army will deploy once Israel withdraws. “This opportunity may not come again,” he warned. Hezbollah’s Loyalty to the Resistance bloc accused the Lebanese government of causing great evil by submitting to the U.S. and Israel, stating that the ceasefire was achieved due to Iranian pressure. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 叙利亚社会民族党赞扬真主党的抵抗力量实施了威慑，并感谢伊朗将黎巴嫩纳入与美国的艰难谈判中。黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩称直接谈判至关重要，并表示停火是谈判的切入点。他要求以色列从南部领土撤军、归还囚犯并解决边界争端。一旦以色列撤军，黎巴嫩军队将进行部署。“这个机会可能不会再有，”他警告说。真主党的“抵抗忠诚”集团指责黎巴嫩政府屈服于美国和以色列，造成了巨大的罪恶，并表示停火是由于伊朗的压力才实现的。@wfwitness

text: 🇸🇾 "We were not a party in any conflict against Iran during the war taking place currently with Iran. We were pushing in a direction not to spark this war from the start, because Iran is a state that has a population of about 85 million people, and any harm that hits Iran from the inside could affect the region in general. We are pushing for the region to be stable and for its problems to be solved via dialogue and diplomacy, not to enter into conflicts and big disputes. We hope this war stops and the region moves to a phase where such wars will not repeat." - Syria's Al-Jolani 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇸🇾 “在当前与伊朗发生的战争中，我们并非针对伊朗的任何冲突的一方。我们从一开始就推动不引发这场战争的方向，因为伊朗是一个拥有约8500万人口的国家，任何从内部打击伊朗的伤害都可能影响整个地区。我们正在推动地区稳定，并通过对话和外交解决问题，而不是陷入冲突和重大争端。我们希望这场战争停止，地区进入一个不再重演此类战争的阶段。” - 叙利亚的贾拉尼 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🌟 Footage shows Hezbollah targeting an Iron Dome radar at Kiryat Eliezer base in Haifa using advanced missiles.
text_zh: 🌟 视频显示真主党使用先进导弹瞄准海法基里亚特埃利泽基地的“铁穹”雷达。

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 "The IDF holds and will continue to hold all the areas it has cleared and captured. The ground maneuver into Lebanon and the strikes against Hezbollah throughout Lebanon have achieved many accomplishments, but they are not yet complete." - Israeli Occupation Minister, Israel Katz 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 “以色列国防军已经并将继续控制所有已清理和占领的地区。进入黎巴嫩的地面机动以及对黎巴嫩境内真主党的打击已经取得了许多成就，但尚未完成。” - 以色列占领部长，以色列·卡茨 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Gulf energy output is unlikely to return to pre-war levels for about two years, according to the head of the International Energy Agency. In an interview with Neue Zürcher Zeitung, Fatih Birol said recovery will vary by country—Iraq will take significantly longer than Saudi Arabia—but overall timelines point to a roughly two-year rebound. He also warned that markets are underestimating the impact of a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz. While oil prices have stayed below $100 per barrel this week, that stability may not last. Pre-war shipments are still arriving, but no new tankers were loaded in March, cutting off fresh supply to Asia. That shortfall is now starting to show. If Hormuz remains closed, expect significantly higher energy prices. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 据国际能源署署长法提赫·比罗尔称，海湾地区的能源产量在未来两年内不太可能恢复到战前水平。在接受《新苏黎世报》采访时，比罗尔表示，各国恢复的速度会有所不同——伊拉克所需的时间将比沙特阿拉伯长得多——但总体时间表显示大约需要两年时间才能反弹。他还警告称，市场低估了霍尔木兹海峡长期关闭的影响。虽然本周油价保持在每桶100美元以下，但这种稳定性可能不会持续。战前的货物仍在运抵，但3月份没有新的油轮装载，切断了对亚洲的新供应。这种短缺现在开始显现。如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，预计能源价格将大幅上涨。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 A resident from the town of Arnoun in southern Lebanon removes an Israeli flag that was planted by IOF soldiers on Shaqif Castle, along with a surveillance camera used for espionage.

text: Ukraine's Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha: We rely on our Turkish friends to organize a meeting at the level of leaders. We are ready for this meeting also in Türkiye — a meeting between Zelensky, Putin, Erdogan, and maybe Trump.
text_zh: 乌克兰外交部长安德烈·西比加：我们依靠我们的土耳其朋友来组织领导人级别的会议。我们也准备在土耳其举行这次会议——泽连斯基、普京、埃尔多安，或许还有特朗普之间的会议。

text: Backchannel talks between the U.S. and Iran are showing progress, with a possible memorandum of understanding at an upcoming meeting and a broader deal within 60 days. “Both sides agree in principle — technical details will follow,” one source said. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 美国和伊朗之间的幕后谈判显示出进展，可能会在即将举行的会议上达成谅解备忘录，并在60天内达成更广泛的协议。一位消息人士称：“双方原则上同意——后续将讨论技术细节。”来源：路透社

text: Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz: The IDF holds and will continue to hold all the areas it has cleared and captured. The ground maneuver into Lebanon and the strikes against Hezbollah throughout Lebanon have achieved many accomplishments, but they are not yet complete.
text_zh: 以色列国防部长伊斯雷尔·卡茨：以色列国防军已经并将继续控制所有其已清理和占领的地区。进入黎巴嫩的地面机动以及对黎巴嫩各地真主党的打击已经取得了许多成就，但尚未完成。

text: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 According to Ukrainian intelligence, Russia is preparing to launch large-scale strikes on Ukraine up to seven times per month — roughly every 4–5 days, Foreign Minister Sybiha said. By their definition, a “massive attack” means at least 400 drones combined with 20 or more missiles. Intelligence suggests this tempo could begin in the near future, he stated at the Antalya Diplomacy Forum. The previous large-scale strike took place yesterday. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 据乌克兰情报部门称，俄罗斯正准备每月对乌克兰发动多达七次的大规模袭击——大约每4-5天一次，外交部长西比加表示。按照他们的定义，“大规模袭击”意味着至少400架无人机加上20枚或更多的导弹。他在安塔利亚外交论坛上表示，情报显示这种节奏可能在不久的将来开始。上一次大规模袭击发生在昨天。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor In the middle of the night, the House quietly passed a bill extending FISA through April 30 by unanimous consent at 2:09a.m., after Republicans blocked earlier procedural votes on the disputed warrantless surveillance law. (ABC) tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 在深夜，众议院于凌晨2:09以一致同意的方式悄然通过了一项将FISA延长至4月30日的法案，此前共和党人曾阻止了对这项有争议的无证监视法案进行早期的程序性投票。(ABC) 推文

text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰守军消灭了一名经验丰富的狙击手，他曾前往乌克兰寻找失踪的儿子，连同他的整个小队一起被消灭。https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045092082847486072/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Russia is preparing mass attacks on Ukraine seven times a month, Foreign Minister Sybiha says, citing intelligence. He adds a mass attack means at least 400 drones and 20 missiles. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 外交部长西比哈援引情报称，俄罗斯正准备每月七次对乌克兰发动大规模袭击。他补充说，大规模袭击意味着至少400架无人机和20枚导弹。推文

text: WarTranslated A Russian milblogger hints things are getting worse for Russian occupiers in Chasiv Yar. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045090948464390173/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 一位俄罗斯军事博主暗示，俄罗斯占领者在恰索夫亚尔的情况正在恶化。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045090948464390173/photo/1 推文

text: 🇺🇦 Kiev must urgently find an alternative to thermal power plants, as they are not a reliable source of heat supply — the head of the Ukrainian State Agency for Infrastructure Restoration and Development Sukhomlin "Even if they are restored, and manage to restore some of their capacity by the heating season, a few missiles could again destroy all this work" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 基辅必须紧急寻找火力发电厂的替代方案，因为它们不是可靠的热力供应来源——乌克兰国家基础设施重建与发展局局长苏霍姆林表示：“即使它们得到修复，并在供暖季节前设法恢复部分产能，几枚导弹可能再次摧毁所有这些工作” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 "Rostec" has begun testing "Podorozhnik" filters, which will allow to protect drones and field telephones from electronic warfare systems. The filters installed on sensitive electronics suppress electromagnetic pulses - this allows it to operate stably. The products operate at a temperature of -60 to +125 °C and are designed for 20,000 hours of operation as part of the equipment, which ensures their trouble-free operation throughout the entire 25-year service life 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 “俄罗斯国家技术集团”（Rostec）已开始测试“车前草”（Podorozhnik）滤波器，该滤波器将有助于保护无人机和野战电话免受电子战系统的干扰。安装在敏感电子设备上的滤波器可以抑制电磁脉冲，从而使其能够稳定运行。这些产品的工作温度范围为 -60 至 +125 °C，设计使用寿命为 20,000 小时，可确保其在 25 年的整个使用寿命期间无故障运行 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
